reviews.review_description:
I miss the old arcade shooters like Time Crisis, and this makes a decent effort to bring that feeling back, as VR is perfect for that sort of game! Now it works well enough, and visuals can be nice, cool dodging mechanics. I appreciate this is made by one person or a small team, but my issue is with the noticeable heavy AI presence in the game.

The voiceovers are definitely AI. Now I get that you might not have the resources, but better would still be if you voiced characters yourself or even got friends or family to voice them.
Now maybe it isn't implemented in the actual game, but the enemies move like they are AI generated. I might be wrong on this, but the movement of enemies has a weird fluidity to it that seems a bit flat.
The thing is that I refuse to knowingly support AI use in any form because of how redundantly destructive it is. I get that when you are a small team it is hard to do the things you need, but using AI is an empty shortcut rather than a helpful innovation.
If you managed to drop the AI uses in this then I would definitely support the full game, but I can't in the present state.
Though I love the ambition and the potential!

reviews.review_title: Good Game; Not a fan of the AI Voices
reviews.review_description: I played the demo of this game and I enjoyed it, but noticed that the voices were AI. I feel like if you can’t be bothered to hire actual voice actors then don’t have voice acting in your game. Please consider hiring voice actors please.
This game is a must own for VR. My wife who hates VR loves this game and I only downloaded the demo. If the devs are reading please please add CO OP!!!!
Need an option  for invincibility just to get through the game please.

reviews.review_title: Closest thing to Time Crisis on VR.
reviews.review_description: This and VR Brigade 2 are essentially modernized versions of the old school Time Crisis games. This game focuses more on actually dodging bullets and VR Brigade to, you physically take cover behind objects. This game is pretty challenging. Even on easy mode, I can't beat the last level..
Great game but way too hard especially when you switch to one life mode which you have to beat to unlock additional missions.

Loved the demo, sound, graphics, just everything, really is a great arcade /rail shooter.. However there are two levels in the demo and no matter which I chose I just get thr same level? Not sure if I've got something wrong or if it's a bug🤷‍♀️
Okay so please add like at least in offline team or a multiplayer section

I would give it 100000000000000000000000000000000000
 stars devs this is epic
Please add gun angle (pitch) and gun yaw options so that you can use an external gun (k3d gun, ace gun) not just controller support, so the experience will be much greater!

developer_response.body: Hey, yes! We already implemented this in full release. Stayed tune, full game coming soon!

reviews.review_description: Whenever the game comes out, please make it for free.And I tell all my friends

I wrote a review on someone's channel who featured this game begging for it to come to quest I am exceedingly excited and overwhelmed with the love and hard work that was put into developing this demo to give us the experience we all been waiting for I truly hope this game comes out sooner than later but please by all means take your time if necessary charges what you want we are all ready to make the purchase and have at least 84 people ready already to buy please do not give up on this project keep it going stick together as a team no pride no boasting no bragging this is by far one of the best shooters that I've played and been waiting on and still waiting on for the full release I love the graphics I love the style of the game I love the coloration I love everything about it so keep it going this might be one of the longer reviews that you will receive stick together as a team accomplish the mission at hand and you will receive every award that you deserve for your labor and hard work to pull off such a wonderful game for us serious VR users so happy it's coming to quest 3 or quest in general but by all means do not hesitate to speed up the process we are all waiting and anticipating for the best shooting game and this is one of the best for sure reminds me of Time crisis and I still have all of them including my light guns Black Shadow signing off with much respect and love look forward to playing this game and we'll brag about it to everyone I know and encourage them to buy it ASAP upon release or wish list
It's just what I need. 2 player option on release would be incredible

reviews.review_title: This is exactly what I missed!
reviews.review_description: I bought my first PlayStation back then solely because of Time Crisis, and I also bought the PlayStation 2 solely because of Time Crisis 2. Then, on the Dreamcast, I was able to catch up on Virtua Cop and play Confidential Mission daily. I miss the light gun genre! With the Sinden light gun and the AimTrak, I was able to play my light gun games again, but it was never as precise, and the crosshairs were never as fast and fluid, as on the tube TV. With VR, I was able to somewhat compensate for my passion for light gun games, and Crisis Brigade 1 & 2 or UnderCover came extremely close to the genre. Aim Assault, on the other hand, IS the genre. It plays exactly like a classic light gun game and also offers the visuals, sound effects, and musical accompaniment. My first impression is overwhelming! Now I'm just hoping for at least ten times as many missions and a co-op mode.
You did good
This is brilliant!  Please release the full version ASAP and just take my money
Can't wait for the full release!
Charge us whatever you like?! We dont mind 😂 Just please release this game ASAP so we can have the new generation of Time Crisis! 🔥

reviews.review_title: Looking forward to the full release!
reviews.review_description: I'm already hyped for the full release of this game. I love the design and action in the demo. Great visuals and action throughout the entire level. Arcade style fun done right. Strongly recommend checking this out!
So glad this is being released on quest as I thought it was PC only,as someone who loved time crisis this game is a dream,can't wait for the full release, great game devs

This is so close to being nostalgic! Im not sure why im holding back on a star, just a feeling. Sometimes the enemies that pop up don’t have that human feel, I think when 4 appear at the same time in a line, feels like duck hunt. Other than that for me, bring on the full release. Love trying to improve my time and the unlockables are great! Great work.

At last, a genuine time crisis rail shooter. A definite purchase on release, 

Devs, please tell me it'll be available for quest 2 as the 'coming soon' page only says it's for the Pro and us poorer folk can't afford an upgrade.

developer_response.body: Hi! Yes its coming to quest2, quest3 and pro. It was mistake on our main page and we submited change of it right now. Thank you for letting us know!

reviews.review_description: This sort of game is perfect for VR. It's more fun and immersive than being in an arcade playing a shooting game. I hope the full game will have lots of levels and will be released soon!
This demo is freaking awesome! Can't wait for the official release!
